title: thryallis glandulosa
intro: Thryallis glandulosa, a flowering plant native to tropical America, is a member of the Rubiaceae family and is commonly known as the Yellow Thryallis or Yellow Flame Tree. Its medicinal properties have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, which include reducing stress and anxiety, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. Thryallis glandulosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
